title: citronella mucronata
intro: Citronella mucronata, also known as East African citronella, is a type of grassy plant that belongs to the same family as citronella and lemongrass. The medicinal properties of Citronella mucronata include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Citronella mucronata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Citronella mucronata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, which are often used in traditional medicine and as natural remedies for various ailments.
